query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A nighttime exterior photograph taken from an extreme low upward angle showing the underside of a building's overhang, which fills the upper portion of the frame as a broad curved white surface with scattered green marks. A continuous horizontal light strip runs along the base of the overhang. Below, an illuminated entrance with glass doors is centered between two flanking columns. To the right, an orange pole supports two rectangular signs and rises from a dark paved walkway with a textured metal grate running along its edge.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime exterior photograph of a building entrance captured with unconventional extreme low-angle framing that curves the architecture into a hemispherical shape and destabilizes the composition. A sickly orange sodium-vapor color cast permeates the entire scene, shifting the white soffit, columns, and signpost toward an unnatural amber hue. The broad curved overhead surface is marked with scattered green stains and illuminated by a horizontal light strip along its lower edge. The entrance features glass doors with interior lighting, centered between two columns. An orange signpost bearing two rectangular signs stands on the right, emerging from a dark paved walkway with a textured metal edge.
